screens.desc: The ADMIN app's start screen: the shared benchless core plus the internal persona bench.
Team — the manager's roster, roster-driven so a person shows before any 1:1 has happened.
Runs — the member's own finished 1:1s, fenced server-side by company and user.
Library (internal QA tooling). Full-page list of every finished run, newest first.
Compare runs — two runs side by side to see what a prompt change moved.
Test engine — the persona hub. Browse the demo people Sero practises on, and run one.
Meeting arcs — a browsable, editable home for every 1:1 type's arc.
Job lexicons — a browsable home for every role's words.
The founder Pulse dashboard — the one-screen view of the live site.
User management — the superadmin's read-only view of everyone across the alpha.
The live interview — one question at a time with live axis scoring.
